title: Pass 5.B.3: ferrotorch-optim Muon/KFAC/LBFGS/SparseAdam silent CPU round-trip
description:
Pass 4 finding (umbrella #982) — ferrotorch-optim audit, GPU_CPU_MISMATCH bucket (4 findings).

- lbfgs.rs:213,236 (gather_params/gather_grads) — always data_vec()?, operates in f64 on CPU, no is_cuda() guard, no GPU path. 1347 LoC optimizer is fully CPU-only.
- natural_gradient.rs:234,239,323,392,397 — KFAC update_factors/step always read via data()?, runs O(batch · in² + batch · out²) triple loops in CPU f64.
- muon.rs:265,270 — Muon step reads data_vec()? unconditionally; silent demotion on CUDA.
- rprop.rs:146,151 + adagrad/adadelta/radam/nadam/adamax/asgd — pub foreach: bool exists but default path is pure CPU f64 (silent demote unless user opts in). Compare sparse_adam.rs:120 + adafactor.rs:174 which honestly Err NotImplementedOnCuda.

Acceptance:
- Add is_cuda() guard + NotImplementedOnCuda error to non-foreach path, OR
- Wire foreach as default for CUDA params
- Discriminating test per optimizer asserting err on CUDA when no foreach path exists.
